---
description: "Use when editing Bones Golem enemy scripts or scenes."
applyTo: "scripts/enemies/enemy_bones_golem.gd, scenes/enemies/enemy_bones_golem.tscn"
---

# Bones Golem Enemy Guidelines

- Keep Bones Golem behavior slow, heavy, and telegraphed.
- Make its offense revolve around a clear ground slam or forward charge choice.
- Use windup and recovery windows so the player can read and punish the attack.
- Keep movement speed, health, slam radius, charge range, and cooldowns in exported tuning values.
- Prefer straightforward state transitions and avoid layered AI logic.
- Preserve the fantasy of a tough frontline enemy with clean impact and cleanup.
